Verification
PulseCheck Verified
Stand out.
Get booked faster.
Verified teachers get a badge next to every certification — studios and clients trust you immediately.
Why verify
Instant trust signal
A verified badge appears on every cert — studios book you before even reading your bio.
Higher match ranking
Our algorithm surfaces verified teachers first in studio searches and fill-my-slot feeds.
Command higher rates
Verified teachers charge an average of 18% more per class than unverified peers.
Public profile badge
Your Linktree-style public page shows a prominent Verified banner — share it everywhere.
By the numbers
3.2×
more booking requests per month
+18%
avg rate increase after verification
48h
average review turnaround
94%
of submitted certs approved first try
How it works
1
Upload your certificate
A clear photo or PDF of each cert you want verified. Official-looking is fine — we accept all formats.
2
Our team reviews it
We cross-check with the issuing body where possible. Most reviews complete within 48 hours.
3
Badge appears instantly
Approved certs get a ✓ Verified badge on your profile, public page, and in all search results.
4
Keep it current
Re-certifications can be re-submitted any time. Expired certs are flagged, not removed.
Free for all PulseCheck teachers · No credit card needed
Questions? Contact support
Upload your certificates
Photos or PDFs — one per certification.
We accept JPG, PNG, PDF up to 10MB each.
